evidence: STALE_0DTE fallback produced 5 trades and $162.8 total, but breakout_long_no_0dte contributed only $71 over 2 trades with 40.5 PnL/exposure hour, 52.6 minute median hold, and -250.25 worst MAE. EXPIRED_0DTE had one strong trade, so this must be measured by state rather than promoted from aggregate PnL alone.
name: No-0DTE Breakout Realization Box
risk: Small sample risk is high; tighter slope and smaller targets can remove or underpay the single EXPIRED_0DTE winner, causing profit suppression without improving portfolio risk-adjusted score.
trigger: STALE_0DTE or EXPIRED_0DTE routed breakout_long_no_0dte entries where no valid 0DTE option map is available and the trade must rely on ES continuation quality.
validation_metric: Fallback PnL/exposure improves versus 83.2 aggregate and 40.5 breakout stale slice, fallback expectancy remains positive, VALID_0DTE PnL/trade count remains unchanged, total net profit retains at least 98% of run_044, and slow_12h remains 0.
